text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the season of the Summer Walk, a time when Umamusume renew
themselves in all kinds of entertaining events leading up to fall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Everyone at the academy is surely excited for the coming festivities. Or rather, almost everyone...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-what in the world is this?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I don't recall talking about sweets the entire time! Well, I suppose I
may have a little, but still...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what's the hubbub? You nearly exploded my ears. Are you
practicing for a choir competition? Polishing your poetry-reading
voice?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! I was checking my interview from the other day. However...
it's put me in a grievous predicament!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Make a Splash! Summer Showdown! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How I spend time on my days off? I often enjoy tea together with my
friends.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
As elegant as your family name suggests! Speaking of that, do you
have a favorite tea?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's difficult to choose, but I do enjoy a good milk tea. I'm recently
quite fond of Hallows' vanilla blend.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The rich, sweet aroma doesn't overwhelm its robust bitterness and
pairs well with both baked and fresh sweets. It's simply delightful.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Ahh, yes. It sounds delicious from the way you describe it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it really is! It's especially good with strawberry shortcake, the
perfect marriage of flavors—uh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A-ahem! Though, it's rare that I ever indulge in such things. We
carefully consider what's served at our tea ceremonies.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Uhh... "And Mejiro McQueen is partial to the cream puffs at Fukiya,
once eating seven in a single sitting."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, please refrain from reading that aloud!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah! That's the place we went last month for the all-you-can-eat! That was so good, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It really was! Wait, that's not the issue at hand! This article makes it
seem like I love dessert!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: But you do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Uh! Still... for that to be on the record...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, this won't do at all. I'll have to ask her to cut the section
about sweets.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
So you'd like to cut from here to here... And cut the part about
honeyade. I'm afraid that won't leave enough to publish.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Might we expand more about Ryan instead? I'm sure the fans would
be thrilled to hear more!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That wouldn't pose a problem for me as well. But are you sure it's all
right? I'm asking for such a large edit...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! It's all part of the job—nothing to worry about. I'll produce
the best article possible that you'll be satisfied with too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm ever so grateful. I know I'm being selfish... I apologize for the
trouble.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Was that really okay for me to ask? I actually did talk about sweets
that much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No! It simply wouldn't be acceptable. Things like that can't be made
public!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But... it was selfish of me. I must be more prudent, as a member of the Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: There it is! The flyer for Splash Recreation!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So this is where they posted it. Oh... hello! Did you come to check the
announcement too, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No, I was only passing through. So that's the... "Splash Rec"? Do you
plan on participating?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'm still on the fence. ♪ Summer Walk events are so popular
every year. Lots of people go multiple years!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, the preliminary will be a water sports contest at a pool,
while the finals will be a water gun battle somewhere far away!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what? "This year's final round will be held on the remote
Makimi Island in the Pacific!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, that's a famous, yet secluded, resort island. I've heard it's
a quiet place of breathtaking beauty.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, how wonderful! ♪ It seems like you can go to watch the finals
even if you lose the preliminaries, so I bet it's a great chance to enjoy
the island!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This is something to check out. I'm super excited! Everybody knows,
"vacations start before you leave and don't end until you return"!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Er, I suppose so... I hope it turns out to be a lovely Summer Walk.

Heheheh! It's your turn now. Come on... Match this and you'll make a major
comeback.

You're insane. All you had to do to win was hold. I'm intrigued—let's do this!
Don't blame me if you regret it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That sounds like...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bring iiiit! Just try and beat this howl! And I play the escape skill!
Time to yank you by the leash!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: What?! "Escape," now? And you've got homing instinct! Damn, I'm out of moves. I'm defeated...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Really, you two? Though I shouldn't be surprised you're making so
much noise.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you should've said something if you were watching. Today will
live forever in the annals of the Dog Game!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh! Looks like you cut it too close this time, Nakayama. Now you're joining Splash Rec, like we promised.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch, there's no way out of this... Can't wait to play water games with
everyone—seriously, I'm not gonna enjoy it, but a bet's a bet. I'll be
there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that was what you wagered? So, you'll be joining Splash Rec as
well, then?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You bet! Where there's ocean, there's ships! Where there's ships,
there's me, no way around it! Worry not, Mac, I didn't forget to send
your application form in too. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm? What did you say?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right! Only the best for this year's competition! Welp, I gotta go
apprentice at the mat-maker! You'll be calling me a master weaver in
no time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Y-you sent in an application for me?! Stop! Wait right this instaaant!
